summary: Full E2E testing of Image Hotspot Quiz (RU). Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passed covering auth, exams CRUD, student-stripped exam, scoring, groups, students, grade-book and role guard. Frontend: teacher login → /teacher with seed exam 'Строение клетки' visible; new exam created with drag-drawn rectangle hotspot + click-built polygon hotspot, hotspot dialog form filled and exam saved successfully (toast 'Сохранено'); groups + students CRUD work (student gets auto STU-XXXXXX code); grades page renders with filter-group / filter-exam dropdowns; student self-registration via /login Регистрация tab works and lands on /dashboard; exam canvas loads, zoom-in/out/reset buttons work, hotspot click opens question-modal, submit-answer-btn returns immediate answer-feedback ('Верно! +3 балл' incl. explanation), correct hotspot turns green, score-display and progress-text update (3 / 1 of 2).

issues: When pasting tall Unsplash image URL the canvas grew to ~1749px height, pushing form controls below the fold; consider max-height/object-fit constraint for the editor preview.

action_items: (Minor) Review request listed selector 'exam-card-*' but actual selector is 'admin-exam-{id}' on teacher dashboard — update docs or rename for consistency.
(Optional) Constrain editor canvas image height (e.g. max-h-[70vh] object-contain) so tall portrait images don't push the side panel.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 836-line module; entities (auth/exams/groups/students/results/upload) could be split into routers for maintainability once the app grows.

/api/upload returns url built from os.environ['FRONTEND_URL'] which may be empty — produces a relative '/api/files/...' URL. Works because frontend hits via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, but make this explicit (BACKEND_PUBLIC_URL) to avoid confusion.
seed_admin() upgrades role to admin if password mismatched — fine; but seed_exam() never re-seeds, which is intentional. Document that deleting the seed exam stops it from reappearing.
Mongo _id is correctly projected away everywhere (good).
answer endpoint locks one answer per hotspot (good immediate-feedback semantics).
test_credentials: Teacher: admin@hotspot.com / admin123. Students self-register via /login Регистрация tab (e.g. TEST_stu_xxxx@example.com / pass1234) or are created by teacher (auto STU-XXXXXX@student.hotspot.com).
seed_data_creation: Created test groups (TEST_Group_E2E), test students (TEST_Student_E2E + STU- prefixed), test exam 'TEST_E2E_Exam' with 1 rectangle + 1 polygon hotspot. Seed exam 'Строение клетки' verified present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All happy paths (teacher editor incl. drag-rect + click-polygon, student exam-taking, scoring, groups/students/grades) confirmed working end-to-end on preview URL. Skipped: circle hotspot drag, results-screen + retake-btn appearance after answering all hotspots (only 1 of 2 answered in the run), JSON export download verification, image upload via /api/upload, OAuth Google session flow. If more depth is needed, focus on those.
